/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-reorder -Wno-unused-variable -Wtype-limits -std=c++17 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -march=native -mfpmath=sse -mavx2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX -DLV_HAVE_SSE -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE -Werror -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libsrsran_rf_uhd.so.0 -o libsrsran_rf_uhd.so.25.10.0 CMakeFiles/srsran_rf_uhd.dir/rf_uhd_imp.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dolaan/Desktop/учеба/диплом/srsRAN_5G/uhd-local/lib: libsrsran_rf_utils.a ../libsrsran_phy.a /home/dolaan/Desktop/учеба/диплом/srsRAN_5G/uhd-local/lib/libuhd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -lpthread -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfftw3f.so
